---
name: NFC compatibility report
about: Report whether your phone can read Bambu Lab spool NFC tags
title: '[NFC] Phone Model - Works/Doesn''t work'
labels: nfc-compatibility
assignees: ''
---

**Phone model**
e.g., Pixel 8 Pro, Samsung Galaxy S24

**Android version**
e.g., Android 15

**NFC chipset**
NXP / Broadcom / Unknown (check with NFC TagInfo app)

**Result**
- [ ] Successfully reads Bambu Lab spool NFC tags
- [ ] Does NOT read Bambu Lab spool NFC tags

**NFC TagInfo output (optional)**
If you have NFC TagInfo installed, paste the tag technology list here.

**Additional notes**
Any other details.
